subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received, and though time doth not permit a detailed reply, this brief response is now penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آنجناب وصول یافت ولی فرصت جواب مفصل نیست مختصر مرقوم میشود
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
